name: hcportal_respondToNewsflash
description: Records the authenticated user's response to a newsflash. Upserts a single HC.PortalNewsflashRead row per user per newsflash. 'I've read it' (@isDismissed=1) permanently dismisses the newsflash. 'Read Later' (@isDismissed=0) snoozes it until the next calendar day (NextShowDate = tomorrow's UTC date). Responds to soft-deleted newsflashes: a user may dismiss a newsflash that was deleted after it was shown to them.

parameters.name: deviceId
parameters.description: Auth: device ID used to look up the authenticated user and device secret. Validated via HC6.ValidatePortalAuth.

parameters.name: accessToken
parameters.description: Auth: short-lived cryptographic token. Validated via HC6.ValidatePortalAuth with NULL callerParamString.

parameters.name: newsflashId
parameters.description: Required: the newsflash being responded to. Validated for NULL before auth.

parameters.name: isDismissed
parameters.description: Required: 1 = permanently dismissed ('I've read it'); 0 = snoozed until tomorrow ('Read Later'). Validated for NULL before auth.

rowsets.name: SuccessEnvelope
rowsets.description: Returned on any outcome — success, validation failure, auth failure, or runtime error.

columns.name: ErrorMessage
columns.description: NULL on success, error message on failure

sideEffects: UPSERT HC.PortalNewsflashRead (NewsflashId, HasherId, IsDismissed, NextShowDate, UpdatedAt) — UPDATE if row exists, INSERT otherwise
breakingChangeRules: Never remove a column from any rowset
Never change the snooze logic (1 calendar day) without coordinating with the portal client
